summary: Repaired SSE reconnect cursor behavior so known cursors replay missed round, timeline, inbox, runtime/source-health, stale/fallback, and diagnostic events, while unknown cursors receive an explicit snapshot_ready recovery event carrying the current read-only snapshot. Branch was committed and pushed.
tasks_completed: Added bounded in-memory live snapshot history for SSE cursor resume.
Changed /api/events reconnect handling to replay typed missed events from a known cursor.
Added explicit snapshot_ready recovery payload with the current read-only snapshot when replay is unavailable.
Added backend reconnect tests covering first cursor replay and unavailable-cursor snapshot recovery.
Updated new UI evaluation docs and OpenSpec task tracking for reconnect recovery.
